---
title: "Title of Section 1"
---

<!-- You have to develop your own headline structure. -->

## Data Preprocessing
### Data importing
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Upload file from ESS website and load it into a DataFrame
file_path = "ESS9e03_3-ESS10e03_3-ESS10SCe03_2-ESS11e04_1-subset.csv"
df = pd.read_csv(file_path, low_memory=False)
print("✅ CSV Load Successful!")
print(f"Dataset Size: {df.shape[0]} rows x {df.shape[1]} columns")
```

### Data Cleaning
```{python}

```

## Headline 2
